query:
SELECT 
  w.id AS workerId,
  w.name AS workerName,
  a.weekStartDate,
  a.confirmedAt,
  a.timeBlocks
FROM workers w
LEFT JOIN availability a ON w.id = a.workerId 
  AND a.weekStartDate >= '2026-02-09 00:00:00' 
  AND a.weekStartDate < '2026-02-16 00:00:00'
WHERE w.status = 'active'
ORDER BY w.id;
